title: SpawnAdapter interface + Claude Code impl + spawn-agent.ts wrapper + personality compiler
description: Define SpawnAdapter interface, build ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter, create spawn-agent.ts wrapper, build personality compiler, update pipeline docs and foreman.

scope.in: SpawnAdapter interface, ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter, spawn-agent.ts, personality compiler, foreman.ts refactor, pipeline doc updates
scope.out: Non-Claude-Code adapters, auto-detect at init, marketing

dod.criterion: SpawnAdapter interface defined and ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter implemented with tracked and detached modes
scripts/spawn-agent.ts is the universal spawn entry point — all callsites refactored
scripts/personality-compiler.ts compiles agent personalities for claude-code and codex platforms
foreman.ts and pipeline docs (09, 00) use spawn-agent.ts instead of direct claude CLI calls
npm run type-check passes with no new errors

tasks.title: Define SpawnAdapter interface and types
tasks.scope: Create server/platform/spawn-adapter.ts with SpawnAdapter interface, SpawnConfig type, SpawnHandle type, and SpawnMode enum.

dod.criterion: server/platform/spawn-adapter.ts exports SpawnAdapter interface, SpawnConfig, SpawnHandle, and SpawnMode types
SpawnConfig.agentId is optional (foreman spawns without --agent)
SpawnAdapter is a separate interface from PlatformAdapter (not extending it)
server/platform/index.ts re-exports all new types from spawn-adapter.ts
npm run type-check passes with no new errors
ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter implements SpawnAdapter interface from spawn-adapter.ts
Detached mode: child process is detached, stdio redirected to outputPath, child.unref() called
Tracked mode: spawn() returns SpawnHandle with promise that resolves to exit code
When agentId is undefined, --agent flag is omitted from args array
npm run type-check passes with no new errors
compilePersonality('devon-fullstack', 'claude-code') returns empty string (no-op)
compilePersonality('devon-fullstack', 'codex') reads .claude/agents/devon-fullstack.md and outputs transformed content
Claude Code-specific frontmatter fields (permissionMode, hooks, skills) are stripped in non-claude-code output
Script is executable via tsx scripts/personality-compiler.ts --agent devon-fullstack --platform claude-code

tasks.title: Create scripts/spawn-agent.ts universal spawn entry point
tasks.scope: Create scripts/spawn-agent.ts as universal CLI entry point.

dod.criterion: tsx scripts/spawn-agent.ts --agent devon-fullstack --prompt 'test' --mode tracked runs without error
tsx scripts/spawn-agent.ts --prompt '/directive test' --mode detached (no --agent) spawns detached process and prints PID
Script reads platform from gruai.config.json, defaults to claude-code if not found
Exit code matches child process exit code in tracked mode
npm run type-check passes with no new errors

tasks.title: Refactor foreman.ts and pipeline docs to use spawn-agent.ts

dod.criterion: foreman.ts no longer directly imports spawn from child_process for agent launching — uses ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter instead
09-execute-projects.md bash template uses tsx scripts/spawn-agent.ts instead of direct claude -p --agent invocation
00-delegation-and-triage.md pre-flight cleanup kills orphaned spawn-agent.ts processes alongside existing claude patterns
foreman.ts launchDirective still produces log files, tracks PIDs, and detaches child processes (behavior preserved)
npm run type-check passes with no new errors
